hints.text: Plate mostly white w/ a **red Soyombo** hint on the left
**Cyrillic** w/ letters **Ɵ Ү** (not in Russian) + double vowels (aa/ЭЭ); unique **ЗОГС** stop sign
All coverage = a **large pickup truck** (often w/ a tent, red mirrors, snorkel, roof racks)
**Steppe** biome: empty grasslands/deserts, characteristic lack of trees, rugged/rolling hills, rivers & lakes
Unique **white bowling-pin bollards** with two red stripes near the top
Russian-influenced infra: wooden poles w/ stone support blocks, white lamp posts, 3-stripe pedestrian signs
Neighbourhoods frequently separated by **dirt alleys + wooden fences**
Large **herds** (horses, yaks, camels, sheep); decorated stone-pile shrines called **ovoos**
Very limited coverage (highways + towns, densest around **Ulaanbaatar**); driving direction tends **away from UB**; east/south flat, north hilly + larch/birch forest, west = mountains
